prompt: Create a premium layered paper-cut editorial poster introducing [Haaland]. The same paper-cut character stands confidently in front of a handcrafted football stadium backdrop. Large paper typography displaying "[Haaland]" appears behind the player. Add the club badge, subtle paper stars, football graphics, and layered paper decorations using the club colors. Warm studio lighting, realistic paper fibers, brass joints, premium handcrafted look..
promptEn: Create a premium layered paper-cut editorial poster introducing [Haaland]. The same paper-cut character stands confidently in front of a handcrafted football stadium backdrop. promptZh: 创作一张高级的层叠纸艺风格编辑海报，介绍 [哈兰德]。画面中，同款纸艺角色自信地站在 手工制作的足球场背景 前。运动员身后显示着巨大的纸艺排版文字 “[哈兰德]”。添加俱乐部徽章、精致的纸质星星、足球图形，并使用俱乐部配色进行层叠纸艺装饰。采用温暖的摄影棚灯光，呈现逼真的纸张纤维质感、黄铜连接件，打造高级的手工艺术效果。
